prestazioni: Engine: Lambda II 3.3L V6 Twin-Turbo (GDI) - Engine Code: G6DH | Full bolt-on turbo upgrade to Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbos with billet compressor wheels, 62mm inducer, and 0.82 A/R turbine housings, paired with custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipes (catless) and a Tomei 3.5" titanium exhaust system with dual 4.5" outlets for optimized spool and top-end flow.

Fuel System: Upgraded to dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps with a Radium Engineering dual catch can setup, ID1050x injectors, and a Syvecs S6Plus standalone ECU with flex-fuel capability, tuned on E85 for 550+ WHP on 93 octane (600+ WHP on E85) with a custom 3D-printed intake manifold plenum (carbon fiber) to reduce heat soak.

Drivetrain & Suspension: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (4.11 final drive ratio) with a Spec Stage 3+ twin-disc clutch, paired with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for G70 chassis), polyurethane subframe bushings (034 Motorsport), and a Cusco 2-point strut tower brace (front) + rear sway bar delete for rotation tuning.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit (G70-specific, 30mm extended fenders) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a Rocket Bunny V2 rear diffuser and a custom 3D-printed front splitter (carbon fiber, 3" overhang) for -250 lbs of aero balance at 120 mph.

Custom forged BBS LM-R wheels (19x9.5 +30 front, 19x11 +35 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear), powder-coated in 'Hyper Silver' with titanium hardware, and a custom 5-axis CNC-machined center cap (Genesis 'Winged' logo).

Full interior carbon fiber overhaul: Seibon carbon fiber door cards, custom Alcantara headliner (black with red stitching), and a full roll cage (custom 8-point chromoly, TIG-welded) with Sparco Pro 2000 seats (red Alcantara, 6-point harnesses) and a custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (flat-bottom, suede).
